identity.name: FREMAX Catalog
identity.vibe: Dark Mode, Carbon Fiber, Technical Blueprints

usage.secondary_button: bg-transparent border border-[#27272A] text-white hover:border-[#FFB800] hover:text-[#FFB800]

landing_page.hero_section: h-[80vh] flex items-center justify-center relative overflow-hidden
landing_page.search_section: absolute bottom-12 left-0 right-0 z-20 px-6

product_catalog.filter_sidebar: w-full md:w-64 flex-shrink-0 border-r border-[#27272A] p-6 hidden md:block

SearchInput.description: Massive, central search input for the hero section.
SearchInput.classes: w-full h-16 bg-[#09090B]/90 backdrop-blur-md border border-[#27272A] text-xl px-6 text-white placeholder:text-neutral-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FFB800] focus:border-transparent transition-all
SearchInput.icon: Search icon from lucide-react, text-[#FFB800] w-6 h-6 absolute right-6 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2

ProductCard.classes: group relative bg-[#121212] border border-[#27272A] hover:border-[#FFB800]/50 transition-colors duration-300 overflow-hidden
ProductCard.image_container: aspect-square bg-[#050505] p-6 flex items-center justify-center relative

StatusBadge.classes: px-2 py-1 text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider rounded-sm inline-flex items-center gap-1.5

TechSpecTable.header: text-neutral-500 font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-wider border-b border-[#27272A] py-3

universal_guidelines: Always use 'Barlow Condensed' for headings to give that 'Garage/Industrial' feel.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for ALL numbers, codes, and dimensions.
Do not use gradients for backgrounds, use solid dark colors (#0A0A0A) or subtle noise textures.
Buttons should be sharp (rounded-sm) or pill-shaped, never standard rounded-md.
Use yellow/orange accents sparingly - only for interactions and key highlights.
Input fields should feel 'heavy' and 'tactile' with distinct borders.
Tables must be dense and readable - this is a tool for mechanics, not a lifestyle blog.
instructions_to_main_agent: Add fonts: 'Barlow Condensed', 'Manrope', 'JetBrains Mono' via Google Fonts.
Configure Tailwind colors to match the 'palette' section precisely.
Create a 'Layout' component that wraps the app with the dark theme class and basic structure.
Implement the 'SearchInput' component as the hero centerpieces.
Build the 'ProductCard' component using the 'Bento' grid logic for internal layout.
Ensure the Admin Dashboard uses the same dark theme but with higher density grids.
